title: PRMP Benchmark on RelBench rel-stack: user-engagement (AUROC) & post-votes (MAE)
summary: Demo notebook benchmarking Predictive Residual Message Passing (PRMP) against standard methods on RelBench rel-stack. Runs cross-table FK-link prediction comparing Linear Regression, MLP, and PRMP-style predictors on 50 examples from the votes→posts relationship. Visualizes pre-computed results across all 9 FK-link sub-datasets and GNN task results (user-engagement AUROC, post-votes MAE) for SAGEConv vs Full PRMP vs Selective PRMP. Includes PRMP diagnostics scatter plot of residual ratio vs FK cardinality. Uses original 300-epoch training; total runtime ~21 seconds.
